components.name: 🎨 [R] Avatar
components.description: Avatars are used to show a thumbnail of a user photo, organisation or a visual representation of other types of content

components.name: 🎨 [R] Card Container
components.description:
OnPage.Default = a card placed on a page or in a modal, dialog, or bottom sheet.

OnSurface.Default = a card placed within another card but only one level in from the page or modal, dialog, or bottom sheet.

OnSurface.Inset = Any card placed within another card that is nested more than one level in from the page or modal, dialog, or bottom sheet.

Body Text.default: Plain message should be short and sweet.
